entry.title: WK Cinematic Lab | Pro Mobile Assets
entry.content:
Welcome to my digital workspace. I am dedicated to pushing the limits of mobile filmmaking, specifically using iPhone 15 Pro Max and the Blackmagic Camera App.

🎁 Free Premium Assets

I believe in sharing high-value tools for free to help fellow creators achieve a professional cinematic look on mobile devices.

  • 🔥 [DOWNLOAD] Blackmagic LUTS (Keep updating) My personal collection of color grading presets optimized for Apple Log and mobile cinematography. 👉 Click Here to Access the Link

🎥 What I Share

  • Pro Workflows: How to master Apple Log on iPhone.
  • Settings Guide: Optimal Blackmagic Camera App configurations.
  • Color Grading: Real-world breakdowns and high-quality LUTs.

📱 Connect with Me

Follow me for more mobile filmmaking secrets and behind-the-scenes content:

  • TikTok (@yf.liu22)
  • Xiaohongshu (@Your_ID)
  • [WeChat Official Account] (Search: 你的公众号名称)

Stay creative. Let’s make every frame cinematic.
